rationale.org-governance: ANN-ISM risk-management apparatus + cybersecurity maturity model for organizations
rationale.ai-code-insecurity: original 14-risk taxonomy of AI-code vulnerabilities, surveyed empirically
rationale.risk-security: focal: injection, backdoors, insecure-template mitigation and scoring
rationale.risk-quality: CR2 code-quality/logic-error risk surveyed + maturity assessed
rationale.risk-overreliance: CR11 over-reliance risk; HITL/XAI mitigation maturity assessed
rationale.built-system: ANN trained; framework implemented, case-study validated in org
rationale.expert-validated: 19-expert Delphi panel appraised framework and results
rationale.survey-input: 70-practitioner survey on risk priorities and AI mitigation practices
rationale.method-field-study: case study of AI code-generation company as evaluation
